metadata.description: Official AIOProductOS plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: aioproductos
plugins.description: AIOProductOS workspace connection (65 spine tools over MCP — read and write across initiatives, features, OKRs, sprints, releases, experiments, decisions and an ideas backlog) + the aioproductos-triage skill and /aioproductos:triage command — Monday-morning product triage grounded in real revenue and usage.

plugins.name: aioproductos-studio
plugins.description: AIOProductOS Studio — record product demo videos and marketing screenshots of your own web app from chat: gliding cursor, camera zooms, captions, branded transitions, MP4/GIF export. Free and fully local.
